title: Nutritótem (DESCOTINUED)
description: This Resource Pack transforms the "Totem of Undying" into the iconic Nutritótem from the DEDsafio, Get Ready for the adventure with your Nutritótem!
body:
Español: Spanish:
Este paquete de recursos reemplaza el clásico "Tótem de la inmortalidad" por el icónico "Nutritótem" de la serie DEDsafio 3, con la textura especial,
inspirada en DEDsafio 2 y 3. Dale a tu mundo un toque único y revive las emociones de la serie con este distintivo ítem. Disponible para todos los idiomas de hablahispana

English: Ingles:
This resource pack replaces the classic 'Totem of Undying' with the iconic 'Nutritótem' from the DEDsafio 3 series, featuring the special texture, inspired by DEDsafio 2 and 3. Add a unique touch to your world and relive the excitement of the series with this distinctive item. Available in all Spanish-speaking languages. (However, it doesn’t matter; if you want, you can use it. It won’t have the name, but it will have the texture.)
